# Bundled fonts

The Deucarian Theming package redistributes unmodified static TrueType fonts for its built-in typography profiles.

## Inter 4.1

- Source release: https://github.com/rsms/inter/releases/tag/v4.1
- Release archive: https://github.com/rsms/inter/releases/download/v4.1/Inter-4.1.zip
- License: SIL Open Font License 1.1; see `Inter-OFL.txt`.
- `Inter-Regular.ttf` SHA-256: `40D692FCE188E4471E2B3CBA937BE967878F631AD3EBBBDCD587687C7EBE0C82`
- `Inter-Bold.ttf` SHA-256: `288316099B1E0A47A4716D159098005EEF7C0066921F34E3200393DBDB01947F`

Copyright (c) 2016 The Inter Project Authors (https://github.com/rsms/inter)

## Montserrat 7.222

- Source release: https://github.com/JulietaUla/Montserrat/releases/tag/v7.222
- Regular source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JulietaUla/Montserrat/v7.222/fonts/ttf/Montserrat-Regular.ttf
- Bold source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JulietaUla/Montserrat/v7.222/fonts/ttf/Montserrat-Bold.ttf
- License: SIL Open Font License 1.1; see `Montserrat-OFL.txt`.
- `Montserrat-Regular.ttf` SHA-256: `6EABD0FB8E3066B6155BAC338EF5A6C35B9963AB3F39BE7C67EDC4A99D870699`
- `Montserrat-Bold.ttf` SHA-256: `4E6D93BC38122C371ACB8DC0DBEFBF2649C235191E1BE136BB5720546D719808`

Copyright 2011 The Montserrat Project Authors (https://github.com/JulietaUla/Montserrat)
